description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a visibly weathered appearance, set on a square wooden platform. The structure features a slanted, red-tiled shed roof with irregular planks and green mossy patches, giving it a worn, outdoor look. The front facade is distinguished by a heart-shaped cutout in the door and two diagonal wooden planks reinforcing the entrance, framed by blue-painted vertical beams. The sides and rear are constructed from vertically aligned, textured wooden boards, with blue trim and horizontal support beams. The cabin is slightly crooked, adding to its whimsical, hand-built character. There are no visible windows, and the only entry is the front door.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a slanted red-tiled roof, blue trim, and a heart-shaped cutout on the front door, set on a wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the heart-shaped cutout on the door, blue trim, and diagonal wooden planks reinforcing the entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying plain vertical wooden boards, blue trim, and two horizontal support beams, with no door or windows.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the slanted roof, blue vertical beams, and the textured wooden boards, with no openings.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view emphasizing the uneven red-tiled roof and the blue-trimmed rear wall with horizontal supports.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, constructed from irregular red ceramic tiles with visible overhang and moss patches
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin; the only opening is a small heart-shaped cutout in the front door
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, reinforced with diagonal wooden planks
